content_body:
Copperhill Brewery, nestled in the historic town of Copperhill, TN, is a vibrant and welcoming craft brewery known for its exceptional beers and inviting atmosphere. Located in a beautifully restored building that reflects the rich history of the area, Copperhill Brewery offers a unique experience for beer enthusiasts and casual visitors alike.

Copperhill Brewery also hosts a variety of events, including live music, trivia nights, and beer release parties, creating a lively and engaging community hub. For those interested in the brewing process, tours are available, offering a behind-the-scenes look at how their delicious beers are made.
title: Copperhill Brewery
